summary: Status Consequence Layer feature fully tested. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: PositionBar displays status badge (AT RISK) with warning icon. OrientationCard displays updated status-aware message ('Your account has active risk signals — your actions have reduced visibility.'). Feed loads correctly with actions sorted by rank_score.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/actions/feed correctly returns rank_score and visibility_weight fields for each action
Feed is properly sorted by rank_score descending (not chronological)
Ranking formula correctly implemented: rank_score = (recency*50 + trust*2 + reactions*3) * author_multiplier
At Risk users correctly have consequence_multiplier=0.70 in both position and orientation endpoints
Orientation message for At Risk users correctly mentions 'reduced visibility'
Enforcement override working: users with active risk signals are capped at multiplier 0.70
CONSEQUENCE_MULTIPLIERS dict correctly defined: Rising=1.15, Stable=1.0, Decaying=0.85, AtRisk=0.70
ENFORCEMENT_CAP=0.70 correctly enforced via get_consequence_multiplier() function
Status calculation in utils/status_calculator.py correctly passes has_active_risk_signals to multiplier function
PositionBar (data-testid='position-bar') correctly displays status badge with AT RISK label and warning icon
OrientationCard (data-testid='orientation-card') correctly displays status-aware message for At Risk users

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified via browser automation)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Status Consequence Layer fully implemented and tested. Key new features: 1) Feed now includes rank_score and visibility_weight for each action. 2) Feed is sorted by rank_score (not created_at). 3) Position and Orientation endpoints return consequence_multiplier field. 4) Consequence multipliers: Rising=1.15, Stable=1.0, Decaying=0.85, AtRisk=0.70. 5) Enforcement override: active risk signals cap multiplier at 0.70 regardless of status. 6) Orientation message for At Risk users mentions 'reduced visibility'. Test users newuser@test.com and trust_fragile@test.com have active risk signals and show consequence_multiplier=0.70.
